# Templates & Checklists Index

This folder contains reusable, generic templates and checklists for the OctoAcme project management lifecycle. Copy and adapt them for your project.

---

## Templates by Phase

| Template | Phase | Description |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| [Definition of Ready & Done](definition-of-ready-and-done.md) | Planning | Entry/exit criteria for backlog items and releases |
| [RACI Matrix](raci-matrix-template.md) | Initiation / Planning | Ownership and accountability across activities |
| [Decision Log](decision-log-template.md) | All phases | Record of key decisions with rationale |
| [RAID Log](raid-log-template.md) | All phases | Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies in one view |
| [Risk Register](risk-register-template.md) | Planning / Execution | Full risk tracking with scoring matrix |
| [Weekly Status Update](weekly-status-update-template.md) | Execution | Consistent weekly stakeholder communication |
| [Release Readiness Checklist](release-readiness-checklist.md) | Release | Quality gates and approvals before deployment |
| [Project Closeout Checklist](project-closeout-checklist.md) | Close | End-of-project activities and archive tasks |

---

## Getting Started

1. **New project?** Start with:
   - [RACI Matrix](raci-matrix-template.md) — clarify ownership
   - [Decision Log](decision-log-template.md) — begin logging decisions immediately
   - [RAID Log](raid-log-template.md) — capture early risks and assumptions

2. **Planning sprint?** Add:
   - [Definition of Ready & Done](definition-of-ready-and-done.md) — agree on entry/exit criteria

3. **In execution?** Use weekly:
   - [Weekly Status Update](weekly-status-update-template.md) — keep stakeholders informed
   - [Risk Register](risk-register-template.md) — keep risks current

4. **Approaching a release?**
   - [Release Readiness Checklist](release-readiness-checklist.md) — gate the deployment

5. **Closing the project?**
   - [Project Closeout Checklist](project-closeout-checklist.md) — wrap up cleanly
